title: AxTrade
description: A lightweight but feature rich & multi-currency trade plugin with a simple configuration.
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/WWHt9qm.png](https://i.imgur.com/WWHt9qm.png)
[![https://i.imgur.com/TtO3PHG.png](https://i.imgur.com/TtO3PHG.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)[![https://i.imgur.com/7iPhwF4.png](https://i.imgur.com/7iPhwF4.png)](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/axtrade.html)
![https://i.imgur.com/HAU2fRJ.png](https://i.imgur.com/HAU2fRJ.png)[![https://i.imgur.com/vm3i2UQ.png](https://i.imgur.com/vm3i2UQ.png)](https://docs.artillex-studios.com/axtrade.html)
<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>


AxTrade
The Ultimate Trade plugin

WHAT IS AXTRADE?
A lightweight but feature rich & multi-currency trade plugin with a simple configuration.

FEATURES

Simple Configuration
Its easy to set up

Good Performance
The plugin is very fast, doesn't affect tps

Database Support
H2, SQLite

ALL ITEMS SUPPORTED
You can trade any item, including those that have custom nbt

MULTI-CURRENCY SUPPORT
Many plugins are supported, check the wiki for the full list

CUSTOM CURRENCY SUPPORT
You can create custom currencies with PlaceholderAPI

TRADE HISTORY
You can look back every trade in trade history log files

START TRADES EASILY
Shift Right click on players to initiate a trade

BLACKLIST SYSTEM
You can blacklist trading in certain worlds, gamemodes

FOLIA SUPPORT

SHULKER & BARREL VIEWER

TRADE SUMMARIES
Players get a trade summary after successful trades

NUMBER FORMATTING
You can use compact/short number formatting (1K, 10M)

BUILTIN ITEM TRANSLATIONS
FULLY CONFIGURABLE GUI

Curious about..
- Commands
- Permission
- Placeholders
- Supported plugins
- Or anything else?
CHECK OUT THE WIKI
By clicking here

</details>


**Is there a plugin that isn't supported? Open a ticket on our discord: [dc.artillex-studios.com](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)**

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**

[![https://i.imgur.com/tAaCMRQ.png](https://i.imgur.com/tAaCMRQ.png)](https://dc.artillex-studios.com/)
